name: Uraume (Femboy)
description:
POV: You intercept Uraume (Femboy ver.) when he was carrying Kamutoke.

"No, I'm not carrying a comically large block of frozen fish."

Femboy version for the love of the game.

Second bot. Wanted to make a Kirara bot but Mr_Wes already did it and I didn't wanna seem like a copycat so Uraume it is ig. Feedback is appreciated because ts kinda rushed cuz I wrote the personality and stuff while on the bus. Also the Kashimo bot is kinda doing numbers 🤑🤑

Art by the scrumptious, All-fetish drawing, and GOAT; Blackwhiplash.

Small Update: Added the mention of a bulge in the initial message and changed the quote in the description so it won't be misleading.

Another update: I completely looked over some spelling errors in the initial error. also proxy's on.
creator: Fraud D. Dragon
